content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "BULLISH",
    "reasoning": "Broad-based rally with Nifty +1.14%, Auto leading +2.30%, IT +1.46%, and VIX cooling -5.82% to 17. Most sectors green; portfolio is in profit (+1.02% today, +6.7% on PNBHOUSING). However, deployment is already 50% with 8 active positions and 3 pending limit orders — focus should be on managing existing book, not adding correlated exposure.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 24050,
      "nifty_resistance": 24400
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1028.66,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "HOLD effectively — current SL of 1028.66 is already above entry (locks in ~4.5% gain), no change needed. NOTE: this is a no-op, switching to HOLD instead."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down 1.9%, but holding above SL of 119 and above SMA20 (122.12). Defensive hedge with gold near record highs in INR. SL gives room; thesis as macro hedge intact ahead of Fed."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1442.00,
      "new_target": 1485.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 8,
      "reasoning": "Position +2.8%, breaking out to fresh 52w high on volume-led Q4 (PAT +27%). Trailing SL up to 1442 (above entry 1412.94, just below today's intraday low 1436) locks in ~2% gain while giving structure room. Target 1485 unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 402.00,
      "new_target": 425.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +1.1%. Power sector strong; record peak demand 256GW. Tightening SL slightly to 402 (just above entry) — not a true trail since gain is small but locks in breakeven. Target 425 unchanged ahead of May 15 Q4 results."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +1.1% with current SL 1742 already above entry (1734). 5x volume surge on Organon $11.75bn deal — mixed (debt-funded, integration risk). MACD bearish cross on daily. SL is properly placed; let it run with breakeven protection."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.4% — too small a move to trail meaningfully. SL at 318 gives ~1.1% room. Strong fundamental backdrop (record power demand, Rs 37k cr FY27 capex). Hold structure."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 472.00,
      "new_target": 488.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +2.5%, hit fresh momentum after Q4 (+11% PAT, Rs 5.25 div). Trailing SL from 469 (entry/breakeven) up to 472 to lock in ~0.6% gain while giving room. Stock pushing toward 52w high 476."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Position +0.4%, dividend ex-date tomorrow (Apr 30, Rs 11/share). Volume surge on dividend capture. SL 605 gives ~1.5% room. Record FY26 results (PAT +68%, 54% EBITDA margin) intact. Don't tighten through ex-div volatility."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1028.66,
      "reasoning": "SL already at 1028.66 locks in +4.5%. Stock consolidating near multi-month high. Let it work toward 1110 target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 119.00,
      "reasoning": "Defensive hedge, hold through Fed event. SL intact."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1442.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL up to 1442 — above entry, locks in gain on breakout move."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 402.00,
      "reasoning": "Tighten SL to breakeven-plus ahead of May 15 Q4 results."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 1742.00,
      "reasoning": "SL already above entry; daily MACD bearish — give it room but don't loosen."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 318.00,
      "reasoning": "Move too small to trail; structural setup strong."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 472.00,
      "reasoning": "Trail SL from 469 to 472 to lock in small gain on push toward 52w high."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDZINC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": 605.00,
      "reasoning": "Hold through ex-dividend Apr 30 volatility."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "Strong setups exist (CEATLTD +147% Q4 PAT, GRSE +24% Q4, MARUTI auto leadership, ADANIENT pre-results) but I'm declining new entries today: (1) book is already 50% deployed with 3 pending limit orders (GLENMARK, PHARMABEES, TATAPOWER) totaling more capital commitment, (2) 5-day performance shows 14% win rate / 0.4 profit factor — discipline says manage what's working, not add. CEATLTD/GRSE have run too far for safe entry (gap-ups of 7-12%); ADANIENT has binary Apr 30 board meeting risk. Will reassess tomorrow. Cancel-watch on the 3 stale OPEN orders if they don't fill by EOD.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is in good shape: +1.02% today, all 8 positions either green or within SL tolerance. Energy/Power cluster is becoming concentrated (NTPC + POWERGRID + COALINDIA + GOLDBEES partial = ~25% of capital) — at the cluster discipline threshold. Will not add ATGL, ADANIENT, or RELIANCE despite strong setups; one expression per theme is sufficient. Pending orders should be reviewed — GLENMARK at 2400 has been open 7 hours; if not filled by 1pm, recommend canceling next tick. Priority for rest of session: monitor SL triggers, no new entries unless a clearly better setup emerges with materially asymmetric R:R."
}
